conversation.content: Let's have a math class. Today we will learn the formula for calculating the area of a square in the world of Azeroth, which is different from the usual method.
My notebook is ready. Let's begin.
In this world, the area S of a square equals half the square of its side length A. Remember this core formula: S = 0.5 × A².
This rule is the foundation for our future calculations of the area of squares and other geometric shapes in the world of Azeroth.
